title: pedilonum aegle
intro: Pedilonum aegle, also known as Pedilanthus aegle or Aegle Marmelos, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pedilonum aegle include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, manage diabetes, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of Pedilonum aegle are typically made from its leaves or fruit, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
